word: G2559 - κακόω - kakóō - kak-o'-o - Make evil affected

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κακόω

- Transliteration: Kakoo

- Phonetic: kak-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to oppress, afflict, harm, maltreat

2. to embitter, render evil affected

- Origin: from G2556

- TDNT entry: 11:04,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2556; to injure; figuratively to exasperate: - make evil affected entreat evil harm hurt vex.
